title: Simple query fails with 'identifier not found'
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_stddev(col1 REAL, col2 INTEGER, col3 TEXT);

SELECT (SELECT AVG((col1 - (SELECT AVG(col1) FROM test_stddev)) * (col1 - (SELECT AVG(col1) FROM test_stddev))) FROM test_stddev) * (SELECT AVG((col2 - (SELECT AVG(col2) FROM test_stddev)) * (col2 - (SELECT AVG(col2) FROM test_stddev))) FROM test_stddev)) AS stddev_product;
SELECT (SELECT AVG(col1) FROM test_stddev), (SELECT AVG(col3) FROM test_stddev);
